summary: Email OTP Auto-Fill Demo Flow tested - ALL 6 backend tests PASSED, ALL frontend UI tests PASSED. Features verified: stay_signed_in toggle (30-day vs 7-day JWT), OTP auto-fill animation, 'Receiving code...' status, no debug banners, Welcome toast, session persistence.

tests.test: Wrong OTP returns 400 with string error detail
Admin email+password login returns valid token
Stay signed in for 30 days toggle visible (checked by default)
Mobile OTP Coming Soon label visible
Use a different email link visible and works
Enter email → click send → auto-fills digits → auto-verifies
Token stored in localStorage after login
User remains logged in on /my-enquiries after refresh

mocked_apis.Resend_email_sending: Email sending via Resend is NOT configured. debug_otp is returned in send response. Frontend auto-fills it for demo/testing purposes.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Email OTP authentication with auto-fill fully working. /auth page has data-testids: auth-welcome-title, auth-email-input, auth-send-otp-btn, auth-google-btn, auth-team-login-link, auth-stay-signed-in, auth-verify-title, auth-otp-email-display, auth-otp-container, auth-otp-input-0 through auth-otp-input-5, auth-verify-otp-btn, auth-change-email-btn, auth-resend-otp-btn, auth-back-btn, auth-brand-logo. Auto-fill flow: send OTP → 1.2s delay → digits fill one by one (110ms each) → 500ms → auto-verify. NO debug banners or developer text visible. Stay signed in checkbox checked by default (30-day JWT). /register and /auth both show AuthPage. /login for admin email+password preserved.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All Email OTP auto-fill features working correctly
